description: A Java Maven project has been loaded at ~/IdeaProjects/refactor-demo/. Refactor Calculator.java to improve code quality by renaming the 'calc' method to 'calculate', renaming parameters 'x', 'y', and 'o' to 'firstOperand', 'secondOperand', and 'operation' respectively, and extracting the repeated logging code into a helper method named 'logOperation'. The project must compile successfully after these changes.
